title: Accessible toggle switch component with controlled and uncontrolled states
purpose: Provides a customizable toggle switch UI element that supports both controlled and uncontrolled usage patterns, with accessibility features and responsive sizing.
module_context: Exports a Toggle component that accepts various props for customization including size, disabled state, and event handling. Defines size classes for different toggle dimensions and manages internal state when not controlled externally.

steps.content: Generate a unique ID for the toggle element.
Initialize internal state for checked status if not controlled externally.
Determine whether the component is in controlled or uncontrolled mode based on provided props.
Select appropriate size classes for track and knob dimensions.
Define the toggle handler that updates state and calls the change callback.
Render the hidden checkbox input for form integration.
Render the visual toggle track with appropriate styling based on checked state.
Render the toggle knob with appropriate positioning and styling.
Render the label element if provided, associating it with the toggle.
IF the toggle is disabled, exit early without changing state.
Calculate the new checked value by inverting the current value.
Update the internal checked state with the new value.
IF a change handler is provided, call it with the new value.
